goal: 修复侧边栏 provider 配置不可用

summary.title: 修复 provider 路由并重构侧边栏产品体验
summary.what: 修复 MV3 sidepanel 的 provider 配置写入、Responses API 路由、二轮 chat 复用 stopped run 的问题，并把 vNext sidepanel 从调试优先的 Control Plane / Chat Shell 改成旧产品风格的 Chat / Sessions / Provider / Skills / Runtime 产品面。Provider 配置页保留 OpenAI-compatible、Responses API、Model、Base URL、API Key，并迁回主力、辅助、兜底模型结构；聊天 transcript 改为文档流；Runtime、interventions、skills、hosts 仍通过现有 shared runtime actions 接线。
summary.why: 用户需要一个可用且像旧产品的重构插件，而不是一个调试控制台；前一轮 provider/chat 可用性修复之后，侧边栏信息架构和视觉密度仍偏离旧产品，导致无法验收真实产品体验。
summary.user_goal: 修复侧边栏 provider 配置不可用

decisions.chose: OpenAI-compatible 默认使用 Responses API，并把 /v1/chat/completions 输入在 Responses 模式下归一化到 /v1/responses。
decisions.rationale: 用户明确要求走 Responses API；这样可以兼容误填 chat completions endpoint，同时避免继续发送 messages payload。
rejected: 只在 UI 文案提示用户手工改 endpoint

decisions.chose: 默认入口改为 Chat，并拆出 Sessions、Provider、Skills、Runtime 产品页。
decisions.rationale: 旧产品的核心体验是聊天工作台加独立设置页；调试能力应该保留但不应占据首屏。
rejected: 保留 Control Plane / Chat Shell 双页
把所有 runtime/config/skill 信息继续堆成一页大卡片

decisions.chose: Provider 成为独立页面，显示主力/辅助/兜底模型结构，并用真实 config.update 保存当前可用字段。
decisions.rationale: 迁回旧产品 Provider 的核心模型角色心智，同时不引入尚未接线的假自定义 provider 管理流。

decisions.chose: 去掉深色聊天气泡，改为文档流和细边提示。
decisions.rationale: 旧产品 Scheme A 更接近可反复工作的浏览器 agent 面板，密度更高、装饰更少。

rejected.alternative: 为 UI/UX 工作继续拆多个小 issue 再逐个推进
rejected.reason: 用户明确指出当前工作流越分越小，阻碍旧产品重构目标；本轮直接推进可验收的产品面。

review_notes: 验证：bun run test -- apps/mv3-shell/test/sidepanel-app.spec.ts apps/mv3-shell/test/runtime-chat.spec.ts 通过。

验证：./node_modules/.bin/biome check apps/mv3-shell/src/sidepanel/App.vue apps/mv3-shell/src/sidepanel/chat-transcript-pane.ts apps/mv3-shell/src/sidepanel/styles.css apps/mv3-shell/test/sidepanel-app.spec.ts 通过。
验证：bun run typecheck 通过，其中 typecheck:mv3-bridge gate 测试通过。
验证：bun run build 通过。

真实浏览器验证：Playwright Chromium persistent context 加载 apps/mv3-shell/dist，打开 chrome-extension://.../src/sidepanel.html，Chat 空态、建议填入 composer、发送 fallback 回复、Provider 保存、Sessions/Runtime 导航均通过且 consoleMessages 为空。
直接打开扩展 sidepanel 页面时 Runtime view 会显示 E_RUNTIME Offscreen document is not available，这是该直连 smoke 环境的 runtime 状态，不影响本轮 UI 导航和 provider/chat 验证。

architectural_claims: sidepanel remains a consumer of shared runtime/resource/control-plane actions rather than introducing private sidepanel state for provider, skills, hosts, or interventions
OpenAI-compatible adapter now supports Responses API request and stream shapes as the default provider path
behavioral_changes: Provider config can be entered from the sidepanel and persisted through config.update without exposing saved API keys in config.summary
OpenAI-compatible provider uses Responses API by default and normalizes chat completions endpoints in Responses mode
runtime chat can send multiple turns after a stopped run by resetting the run before reuse
sidepanel opens on Chat and exposes product tabs for Sessions, Provider, Skills, and Runtime instead of Control Plane / Chat Shell
chat empty state suggestions populate the composer and the Send flow remains wired to runtime.chat.send
Provider view exposes主力/辅助/兜底 role rows while only saving fields that are actually wired

api_changes.signature: config.update model patch accepts provider/api/model/baseUrl/apiKey for LLM profile persistence
Kernel facade exposes resetRun for stopped run reuse in loop orchestration

data_model_changes.name: LLM profile config
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Saved API keys remain redacted from config.summary and are rehydrated only into active provider profile config.

security_implications: API keys entered through sidepanel are persisted via config.update but are not echoed in config.summary or UI summaries.
The UI smoke used a fake API key in a temporary Chromium profile only.
migration_notes: Old product UI was used as behavior and information architecture reference, not as a compatibility layer.
Sessions currently surfaces the active runtime session only because historical session listing is not exposed by the vNext sidepanel runtime bridge yet.
